title: Authentic Tandoori Chicken Wings
description: Savor the rich flavors of North India with these spicy, crumbly, and energizing Tandoori chicken wings, perfect for a snack or appetizer.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together yogurt, lemon juice, ginger paste, garlic paste, garam masala powder, cumin powder, coriander powder, turmeric powder, cayenne pepper, Kashmiri red chili powder, and salt.
Add the chicken wings to the marinade and mix well to coat.
Cover and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
Remove the chicken from the marinade, letting any excess liquid drip off.
Place the chicken on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and bake for 25-30 minutes, or until cooked through.
While the chicken is baking, mix together the breadcrumbs and a pinch of garam masala powder on a plate.
Remove the chicken from the oven and toss in the breadcrumb mixture to coat.
Return the chicken to the baking sheet and bake for an additional 5-7 minutes, or until the breadcrumbs are golden brown and crispy.
Serve hot with cilantro and a dollop of raita, if desired.
